title: Dancers
description: Perform dances. May perform on stage, for broadcasting, or for video recording.

tasks.text: Study and practice dance moves required in roles.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Harmonize body movements to rhythm of musical accompaniment.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Train, exercise, and attend dance classes to maintain high levels of technical proficiency, physical ability, and physical fitness.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured task combining routine and non-routine responsibilities.

tasks.text: Coordinate dancing with that of partners or dance ensembles.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Develop self-understanding of physical capabilities and limitations, and choose dance styles accordingly.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform classical, modern, or acrobatic dances in productions, expressing stories, rhythm, and sound with their bodies.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Collaborate with choreographers to refine or modify dance steps.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Audition for dance roles or for membership in dance companies.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Attend costume fittings, photography sessions, and makeup calls associated with dance performances.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Monitor the field of dance to remain aware of current trends and innovations.
tasks.rationale: Semi-structured cognitive task involving analysis, inspection, or monitoring.

tasks.text: Prepare pointe shoes, by sewing or other means, for use in rehearsals and performance.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Perform in productions, singing or acting in addition to dancing, if required.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.

tasks.text: Devise and choreograph dance for self or others.
tasks.rationale: Complex problem-solving, strategic leadership, or high-empathy task requiring human judgment.
